title: Defamation Amendment Act 2025
text: Defamation Amendment Act 2025 An Act to amend the Defamation Act 2005 [Royal Assent 16 June 2025] Be it enacted by Her Excellency the Governor of Tasmania, by and with the advice and consent of the Legislative Council and House of Assembly, in Parliament assembled, as follows: 1. Short title This Act may be cited as the Defamation Amendment Act 2025 . 2. Commencement This Act commences on the day on which this Act receives the Royal Assent. 3. Principal Act In this Act, the Defamation Act 2005 is referred to as the Principal Act. 4. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 5. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 6. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 7. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 10. The amendments effected by this section have been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 13. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 14. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 15. The amendment effected by this section has been incorporated into the authorised version of the Defamation Act 2005 . 16. Repeal of Act This Act is repealed on the first anniversary of the day on which it commenced. from top.html -->
